series_metadata.series_description: These files contain copies of invoices that have been sent to sign owner, money deposited and verification by sign owner of any updates to permit file.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper in active area for two years. ; Electronic: Scan paper documents into electronic format. Retain scanned image in electronic format for 25 years or until determined to be of no value, then erase., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
